summary: Classified five open PRs independently as inventory items. No shared canonical was selected, no closures are recommended, and no security routing is needed from the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Useful focused feature PR with proof and passing checks, but this inventory job does not allow merge or fix work and provides no duplicate/superseding canonical to close against.
Focused contributor bug fix with proof and no hydrated duplicate or superseding PR in this shard; keep it as an independent maintainer-review item.
Focused bug-fix PR with proof, but a failing check and no merge authority in this job mean it should remain open as an independent review item.
Maintainer-owned draft replacement work is broad and actively scoped by maintainers; keep it independent and do not use it as a canonical closeout target in this inventory shard.
The PR is not a duplicate or low-signal closeout candidate under this job, but proof and checks currently block any stronger recommendation.
